channel.title: Admin Only on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Admin Only on VitaminDWiki

item.title: 10 minutes
item.description:
5-10 minutes of sun provides ONLY 1,000 IU ONLY IF

  • you are near the equator

  • AND young (seniors 4X longer)

  • AND not obese ( need 3X longer)

  • AND have light skin (Dark Skin need 4X longer)

  • AND it is summer

  • AND it is the middle of the day

  • AND you have lots of skin exposed to the sun

  • AND you are lying down

  • AND you are not wearing sunscreen

item.title: After reaching Vitamin D plateau we need to evaluate response
item.description:
Expecting to give 50,000 IU of Vitamin D weekly (or 7,000 IU) daily to many adults,

   along with some Magnesium and Vitamin K2-7

After the response has plateaued (1 month with loading dose, 3 months otherwise)

everyone should get a vitamin D test to determin if any change is needed
__Test results % Possible reasons for the result Possible actions__
<40 ng
(<100 nmol/L)		 32% Senior, Autistic, Smoker, Obese, slow responder
taking statins, low magnesium, bariatric surgery,
Poor health (consuming vitamin D)
POOR: liver, genes, gut, pancreas, gall bladder		 1) larger dose of Vitamin D,
2) gut-friendly vitamin D,
3) probiotics
4) wait for slow responder
40 ng-120 ng
(100-300 nmol/L)		 60% Right on target no change needed if feel benefit
40 ng-120 ng
(100-300 nmol/L)		 5% on target, but not feel any benefit
Vitamin D probably not getting to cell		 Activate Vitamin D receptor
   (weekly dosing, Resveratrol, etc.)
What to do if Poor Kidney, 3 other genes
>120 ng
(>300 nmol/L)		 3% Excessive response
Genes, drugs being taken		 Reduce Vitamin D dose - perhaps by 50%
>200 ng
(500 nmol)		 1% Dangerous response Should person stop taking Vitamin D
Might daily be better for that person?

References

item.title: 50K vitamin D levels and diseases
item.description:
Response to Vitamin D Additional Diseases Treated
A
B
C

| |

VitaminDWiki interview and transcript - Jan 2022

40-150 ng of Vitamin D need to treat health problems

Hypothesis of cause and effect of vitamin D deficiency

item.title: Test of count of items in deficiency category
item.description:
All objects in the category:

Wiki pages in the category:

Files in the category:


Markdown:
--------

#### All objects in the category:

<!-- {LIST(cache="y")}
{filter categories="3"}
{OUTPUT(template="count")}
{OUTPUT}
{LIST} -->

#### Wiki pages in the category:

<!-- {LIST(cache="y")}
{filter categories="3"}
{filter type="wiki page"}
{OUTPUT(template="count")}
{OUTPUT}
{LIST} -->

#### Files in the category:

<!-- {LIST(cache="y")}  {filter categories="3"}
{filter type="file"}
{OUTPUT(template="count")}
{OUTPUT}
{LIST} -->

AST Structure:
-------------
├── BoldNode
│   full_match: `__~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL} items~~__`
│   inner_content: `~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL} items~~`
│   children:
│   ├── ColorNode
│   │   full_match: `~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL} items~~`
│   │   inner_content: `{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL} items`
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content: #00F
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── SqlNode
│   │   │   full_match: `{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL}`
│   │   │   inner_content: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3`
│   │   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   │   raw_content: db=>vitamind
│   │   │   │   db: >vitamind
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: ` items`
│   │   │   inner_content: ` items`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `\n!!!! All objects in the category:`
│   inner_content: `All objects in the category:`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `All objects in the category:`
│   │   inner_content: `All objects in the category:`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST(cache="y")}\n{filter categories="3"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: cache="y"
│   │   cache: y
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `\n!!!! Wiki pages in the category:`
│   inner_content: `Wiki pages in the category:`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `Wiki pages in the category:`
│   │   inner_content: `Wiki pages in the category:`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST(cache="y")}\n{filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: cache="y"
│   │   cache: y
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\n{filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n\n`
│   inner_content: `\n\n`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `\n!!!! Files in the category:`
│   inner_content: `Files in the category:`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `Files in the category:`
│   │   inner_content: `Files in the category:`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST(cache="y")}  {filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="file"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `  {filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="file"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: cache="y"
│   │   cache: y
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `  {filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="file"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `  {filter categories="3"}\n{filter type="file"}\n{OUTPUT(template="count")}\n{OUTPUT}\n`

Original Tiki:
-------------
__~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=3{SQL} items~~__

!!!! All objects in the category:
{LIST(cache="y")}
   {filter categories="3"}
 {OUTPUT(template="count")}
  {OUTPUT}
{LIST}

!!!! Wiki pages in the category:
{LIST(cache="y")}
   {filter categories="3"}
  {filter type="wiki page"}
 {OUTPUT(template="count")}
  {OUTPUT}
{LIST}


!!!! Files in the category:
{LIST(cache="y")}  {filter categories="3"}
  {filter type="file"}
  {OUTPUT(template="count")}
  {OUTPUT}
{LIST}
